stories.headline: Meta Cuts 8,000 Jobs and Cancels 6,000 Openings in Sweeping AI Restructuring
stories.key_takeaway: Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs and canceling 6,000 open roles not during a downturn but at peak revenue, signaling that AI-driven workforce displacement has become a structural force in the tech industry.

pull_quote.text: AI is the most consequential technology of our lifetimes.

stories.article_excerpt: On the same day it notified roughly 8,000 employees that their jobs were gone, Meta reported record quarterly revenue of $56.31 billion

stories.headline: Intuit Cuts 3,000 Jobs and Closes Offices as TurboTax Owner Bets Everything on AI
stories.key_takeaway: Intuit is cutting 17% of its workforce and closing two offices while signing multi-year AI partnerships with both Anthropic and OpenAI.

pull_quote.text: We are reducing complexity across our organization and reallocating capital to accelerate our AI-driven strategy.

stories.article_excerpt: Intuit is eliminating 3,000 jobs — roughly 17 percent of its 18,200-person global workforce — in what CEO Sasan Goodarzi

stories.headline: Mistral AI Acquires Vienna-Based Emmi AI to Build Physics-Powered Industrial Stack
stories.key_takeaway: Mistral adds physics-simulation capability to its growing vertical stack, positioning itself as Europe s only full-stack industrial AI platform.

pull_quote.text: Engineering teams will be able to move from days of simulation to seconds.

stories.article_excerpt: Paris-based Mistral AI has acquired Emmi AI, a Vienna startup that teaches machines to simulate the physical world

stories.headline: Cursor Ships Composer 2.5 In-House Coding Model That Matches Claude and GPT on Benchmarks
stories.key_takeaway: Cursor s Composer 2.5 matches Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5 on SWE-Bench at 10x cheaper pricing, showing specialized RL post-training can rival frontier models.

pull_quote.text: These dimensions are not well captured by existing benchmarks, but we find that they matter for real-world usefulness.

data_points.label: More synthetic training tasks vs v2

stories.article_excerpt: Cursor shipped Composer 2.5 on May 18, a proprietary agentic coding model that pulls off a trick few thought possible

stories.headline: Amazon Alexa Now Generates Full AI Podcast Episodes From 200-Plus News Sources on Demand
stories.key_takeaway: Amazon launched Alexa Podcasts, generating full conversational episodes on any topic from 200+ licensed news sources, free to Prime members.

pull_quote.text: Turn any topic you are curious about into a podcast episode, ready in minutes.

stories.article_excerpt: Amazon has quietly redrawn the boundary between voice assistant and media company with Alexa Podcasts

stories.headline: Zhipu AI GLM-5.1 Becomes First Open-Weight Model to Match Frontier on Agentic Coding
stories.key_takeaway: GLM-5.1 is the first open-weight model to outscore all closed frontier models on SWE-Bench Pro, trained entirely on Huawei Ascend chips under MIT license.

pull_quote.text: The entire GLM-5.1 model family was trained on 100,000 Huawei Ascend 910B chips using the MindSpore framework.

stories.article_excerpt: When Z.ai pushed GLM-5.1 to Hugging Face, it did something no open-weight model had managed before

stories.headline: Anthropic Adds Private MCP Tunnels and Self-Hosted Sandboxes to Claude Managed Agents
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic split Managed Agents into managed orchestration and customer-controlled execution, letting enterprises run Claude agents entirely inside their own security perimeters.

pull_quote.text: A lightweight gateway opens a single outbound connection, end-to-end encrypted, with no inbound firewall rules or public endpoints required.

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic drew a bright line between what an AI agent can do and where it is allowed to do it

stories.headline: Anthropic Releases Ten Ready-to-Run AI Agent Templates for Financial Services
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic released ten production-ready AI agent templates for finance covering pitchbooks, KYC screening, month-end close, backed by 16+ data provider integrations.

pull_quote.text: Together we are building an agent that compresses AML investigations from days to minutes.

stories.article_excerpt: Wall Street has spent years watching AI inch toward the trading floor. Anthropic stopped inching.

stories.headline: Apple Reportedly Opening Apple Intelligence to Google and Anthropic as Third-Party AI Providers
stories.key_takeaway: Apple is building an Extensions framework for iOS 27 ending ChatGPT exclusivity, letting users route Siri and Writing Tools to Gemini, Claude, or other providers.

pull_quote.text: The companies that can get their models into the flow of daily tasks are the ones that will shape how people think about AI.

stories.article_excerpt: For the past eighteen months, OpenAI held an unusual distinction: it was the only outside AI company woven into Apple

stories.headline: Jury Rejects Every Claim in Musk v OpenAI After Less Than Two Hours of Deliberation
stories.key_takeaway: A unanimous jury dismissed all of Musk s claims on statute-of-limitations grounds in under two hours, clearing the way for OpenAI s anticipated IPO.

pull_quote.text: The judge and jury never actually ruled on the merits of the case, just on a calendar technicality.

stories.article_excerpt: A nine-person jury in Oakland took less than two hours to throw out every one of Elon Musk s claims against OpenAI

stories.headline: EU Reaches Omnibus Deal to Simplify AI Act Rules and Delay High-Risk Deadlines
stories.key_takeaway: The EU AI Omnibus delays high-risk AI deadlines from August 2026 to December 2027, expands SME exemptions, and bans nudifier AI tools.

pull_quote.text: The outcome has left stakeholders from both civil society and industry frustrated rather than relieved.

stories.article_excerpt: At 4:30 in the morning on May 7, after an all-night session, EU negotiators reached a deal to simplify the AI Act

stories.headline: Pope Leo XIV Will Present First AI Encyclical Alongside Anthropic Co-Founder Christopher Olah
stories.key_takeaway: Pope Leo XIV will release Magnifica Humanitas on May 25 with Anthropic s Christopher Olah, whose company recently clashed with the Pentagon over military AI.

pull_quote.text: The questions posed by AI are bigger than the AI community.

stories.article_excerpt: On May 25, the Vatican will attempt something unprecedented: a sitting pope will share a stage with a Silicon Valley AI researcher

stories.headline: American Medical Association Issues First Patient-Facing Guidelines for AI Chatbot Use in Healthcare
stories.key_takeaway: The AMA released a five-prompt patient guide positioning AI chatbots as pre-visit preparation tools, as 66 million Americans already use AI for health advice.

pull_quote.text: Safe and informed use of AI helps patients make smarter health decisions, but medical expertise remains irreplaceable.

data_points.label: Americans using AI for health advice

stories.article_excerpt: The nation s largest physician organization has drawn a line in the digital sand: AI chatbots can help you prepare

stories.headline: Geneformer Model Scales to 100 Million Human Cell Transcriptomes for Network Biology Predictions
stories.key_takeaway: Geneformer s expanded pretraining on 104 million cells and scaling to 316M parameters establishes power-law improvements in network biology, while quantization cuts compute by 85%.

pull_quote.text: The largest model shows the highest zero-shot performance on both gene- and cell-level biologically meaningful tasks.

stories.article_excerpt: A transformer model that once learned biology from 30 million cells has now consumed more than 104 million

stories.headline: AI System Predicts Emerging Research Trends Two to Three Years in Advance by Mapping Scientific Literature
stories.key_takeaway: A KIT team published a system achieving above 0.9 AUC in predicting which research topics will emerge as significant two to three years ahead.

pull_quote.text: Our findings are not an invention machine, they are an analytic tool that can help identify new ideas and opportunities for collaboration more effectively.

stories.article_excerpt: The number of scientific papers published each year has grown so fast that even leading researchers can no longer keep up
